welcome.new: Welcome. I’ll shape your {appName} home around {interestText}, in {language}, with a pace that feels realistic from day one.
welcome.returning: Welcome back. Your dashboard is still focused on {interestText}, with a {level} path, a {studyTime} study pace, and a {theme} theme.

interestSummary.empty: Choose a subject and {appName} will surface the right next lesson, practice set, and trial.
interestSummary.focused: Focused on {interests}. Start where it matters most.

gate.title: Welcome to {appName}! Let’s set up your learning space.
gate.description: Answer a few quick questions to personalize language, subjects, level, pace, and theme. You can change everything later.

hero.title: {appName} organizes your dashboard around the subjects you want to learn.
hero.descriptionFresh: {appName} starts with a short guided setup, then recommends the right subjects, practice entry points, and trial questions based on your language, level, and weekly pace.

preferredLanguage.title: What language should {appName} use for your experience?
preferredLanguage.description: This sets your default language for onboarding, navigation, and practice copy where translations are available.

learningInterests.title: What do you want to focus on first?
learningInterests.description: {appName} will prioritize the right subjects, entry points, and practice suggestions on your home.

level.title: What best describes your current level?
level.description: This helps {appName} decide whether to start you with foundations, mixed practice, or more advanced material.

studyTime.title: How much time do you want to study each week?
studyTime.description: Your weekly pace helps keep recommendations realistic instead of overwhelming.

discoverySource.title: How did you hear about {appName}?
discoverySource.description: This helps us understand which channels bring in the right learners and improve onboarding over time.

themePreference.title: Which theme would you like to use?
themePreference.description: Pick the look that feels best for reading, coding, and daily practice.

trialIntent.title: Would you like to try 3 questions next?
trialIntent.description: Start a short trial now, or come back to it from the homepage later.

choices.themeLightHint: Bright and clean for daytime study.
choices.themeDarkHint: Softer for low light and longer sessions.
choices.trialNowHint: We’ll launch a short 3-question practice trial after setup.
choices.trialLaterHint: You can start from the homepage whenever you’re ready.

panel.title: Personalize your space
panel.description: Answer a few quick questions. You can edit everything later.

highlights.title: Minimal on day one. Smarter with progress.
highlights.description: {appName} begins with a clean dashboard, then adapts using your interests, enrollments, and practice activity so the next step stays obvious.

language.title: Language
language.text: Use the language that feels most natural while you browse subjects and start your learning journey.

level.title: Level
level.text: Your first recommendations can lean more foundational or more advanced based on your current comfort level.

pace.title: Weekly pace
pace.text: Set a realistic weekly schedule and come back regularly. You’ll learn better and faster through consistent practice, so make it a habit.

recommended.title: Start with the subjects you actually want to learn.

trial.startError: Could not start the trial right now.
trial.overlayDescription: This will only take a moment.
